---
title: "Volunteer Portal"
---

# Training Materials

[General Volunteers](https://www.clecatproject.org/volunteer-training){.main-button}

[Foster Volunteers](https://www.clecatproject.org/foster-training){.main-button}

[Adoption Counselors](https://www.clecatproject.org/adoption-counselors){.main-button}

[Adoption Advocates](https://www.clecatproject.org/adoption-advocates){.main-button}
